channel.title: m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Toolbox
item.description: List of handy tools and other resources coming accross my way.

item.title: Cheat Sheet
item.description: Repertory of useful commands which don’t need their own page.

item.title: Arduino ESP32 firmware backup
item.description: This article explains how to extract an Arduino firmware to have a backup of it, and hopefully beeing able to restore it one day.

item.title: WLAN access point with hostapd
item.description: With hostapd you can quickly and easily run an access point. Sometimes it can be useful to diffuse a temporary SSID and/or analyze the traffic from a specific device with Wireshark.

item.title: OTA WLAN packet capture
item.description: Capturing raw WLAN frames Over-The-Air isn’t the most straightforwad thing to do. This articles paves the way for achieving that easily on Linux with cheap hardware. Cherry on the cake : full 6GHz spectrum is supported (up to Wi-Fi 6E).

item.title: Windows 11 IoT in QEMU
item.description: Sometimes you absolutely need Windows to run a piece of software. This page explains how to install and run Windows 11 IoT LTSC into QEMU in less than 30 minutes.

item.title: Software Defined Radio with RTL2832U
item.description: I’v got a cheap blue DVB-T+FM+DAB dongle to play with SDR.

item.title: Raw data copy with dd on Linux
item.description: dd is a great tool to do a raw (or binary) copy of a storage device or a file.

item.title: Garage door control with Shelly and BLE
item.description: Garage doors usually come with proprietary remotes, which may have drawbacks. This page explains how to replace remotes for the Entrematic Magic 600-2, with the Shelly 1 Gen3 relay and the Shelly BLU Button Tough 1.

item.title: Fixing Linux command permissions
item.description: Some often used commands don’t work out-of-the-box with an unprivileged user. This page will explain how to get around.

item.title: GNOME Boxes
item.description: Boxes is the built-in virtual machine manager included with the GNOME desktop environment. As it’s there, let’s give it a try !

item.title: Boot interruption keystrokes
item.description: Each vendor uses different keys to interrupt boot sequence and chose boot device, open the BIOS/UEFI configuration page or do whatever is possible.

item.title: File transfer stuck at 99% on Linux
item.description: When copying a big file to an USB drive, the copy seems to be stuck at 99% even if it’s not the case.

item.title: Wiping storage devices
item.description: Before giving or throwing devices away, you should better wipe storage drives properly. Otherwise your data may be recovered and who knows what happens next…
